test.note: All 10 history tests passed on third run. First two runs had flaky failures due to AI response timing.

typecheck.note: Fixed missing useRef import in src/App.tsx

blockingIssues.description: VAL-HIST-008 'Direct URL access to session works' does NOT actually test direct URL access. It clicks on session link from history list instead of using page.goto() to navigate directly to /history/{sessionId}. The validation contract explicitly states 'Navigating directly to /history/{sessionId} for valid session shows detail' with evidence being a screenshot.
Test file appears truncated to 285 lines based on git diff output. The transcript skeleton showed a 424-line implementation. The actual committed file may be missing proper test implementations.
